heroHeadline: Hormuz Fracture: Trump's 'Cowards' Broadside Deepens NATO Crisis as Europe Refuses Iran War
heroSubtitle: The US-Israel war against Iran and closure of the Strait of Hormuz has become NATO's sharpest crisis in decades — Trump's ultimatums, Europe's united refusal, and Rutte's tightrope diplomacy expose a 'broad-gauge crisis of trust' across the transatlantic alliance
footerNote: Data sourced from NATO HQ, White House, Financial Times, Reuters, CNN, NPR, Washington Post, Al Jazeera, German Marshall Fund, Brookings Institution
